official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound select_known_packs packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound select_known_packs body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed select_known_packs packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed select_known_packs packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded known-pack list and official known-pack fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the select_known_packs body.
The official ClientboundSelectKnownPacks.STREAM_CODEC writes a KnownPack list.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundSelectKnownPacks.
The decoded official ClientboundSelectKnownPacks preserves the empty known-pack list for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded known-pack list, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove registry hydration, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized registry state, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
